## Investment View
SPXC scores 43/100 as a fragile_watch setup. The score is driven mainly by the technical breakout picture, with 3 constructive versus 0 adverse stock-specific signals and a market overlay impact of 0 supportive versus 7 adverse effects.

- Thesis: The setup is still mixed and needs cleaner confirmation from price action, stock-specific flow, or a more favorable market overlay before it becomes a stronger breakout candidate.

## What Matters
- Volume anomaly is strong at 2.52, which supports the move. (high)
- Price is above EMA20, EMA50, EMA200, which keeps the medium-term trend supportive. (medium)

## Risks / Invalidation
- Price is still below the prior 20-day high (225.06), so the breakout remains unconfirmed. (high)
- A close back below 225.06 would weaken or invalidate the current breakout picture. (high)

## Catalysts
- The next 1 to 4 weeks matter most around whether price can keep holding above 225.06 and attract follow-through volume. (medium)
